jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Active full-product QA remediation loop (9e36e64a75ae) based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md; requires real browser/user-path QA, functional side-effect verification, code quality, performance, UX/accessibility, reliability, tests, deployment, and production health checks.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: Checklist completion requires a broad audit plus software-tester-style real browser/visual QA on production before a new remediation round starts. Use browser login and click through major pages/workflows visually; split into batches if needed; record/fix/triage findings in remediation-backlog.md before continuing.
completionQaBatches: QA batch 1: login, shell/navigation, dashboard, global search, notifications, preferences/default-page behavior, responsive layout
QA batch 2: VPS/server management and SSH terminal, including Direct Gateway eligibility and idle stability
QA batch 3: Files/storage/SFTP/upload/download/direct access, including sync warnings, capabilities, share links, signed/direct access
QA batch 4: Downloads, Quick Services, Commands, Requests, Deployments, Scheduled Tasks, Templates, Operation Tasks

QA batch 5: Backups/restore, Monitoring, Health/System Health, Settings/admin runtime tuning, Tickets, Announcements/Snippets, API Tokens, AI providers, image bed, API docs, audit/security-adjacent operator flows

lastHealthyBaseline.lint: passed with existing client-effect warnings only
lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Files tree/API, media service/card, preview direct-access, and traffic summary regressions 14/14 passed
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws, and caddy active after restart; /api/status healthy; /files /media /traffic unauth 307, related APIs 401, logged-in Files/Media/Traffic API+DOM proof succeeded; recent logs clean

lastRun.summary: Closed the dirty Files preview sanitizer handoff and expanded it into a coherent Files/Media/Traffic availability slice. Files tree grouping now keeps configured storage-node roots visible across SSR and SPA refresh, including empty LOCAL roots. Media classification and previewability now infer image/audio/video from file extension when MIME is blank/generic; Media Library cards expose preview/download/source actions; Traffic Center storage-node source labels now explain local, bound-server, and remote-SFTP origins instead of relying on blank/ambiguous values.
validation: Production browser login with temporary qa_cron_fm_0601 admin succeeded; post-deploy cleanup deleted qa_cron_* users and remaining count is 0.
Logged-in /api/files/list returned grouped roots: 31.22.111.48 SFTP, 45.207.216.45 SFTP, empty 本机默认存储 LOCAL, and test SFTP with file/folder counts.
Logged-in /api/media returned 3 real image media items; /media page rendered preview/download/source links for each item.
Logged-in /api/traffic/summary and /traffic page rendered storage traffic source labels/details for 当前服务器网卡 and 绑定服务器 sources; no blank/unknown source labels were present.
Database QA query confirmed current media index has real image items and no generic-MIME media candidate remains unindexed in the sampled production data.

npx vitest run src/lib/files/__tests__/tree.test.ts src/app/api/files/list/__tests__/route.test.ts src/lib/media/service.test.ts src/app/media/__tests__/media-item-card.test.tsx src/app/files/preview/__tests__/direct-access-button.test.tsx src/app/api/traffic/summary/__tests__/route.test.ts: 14/14 passed.
npm run lint: passed with existing client-effect warnings only.
Production restart of vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service completed; .next ownership repaired; services plus caddy active.
Recent vcontrolhub-next/vcontrolhub-ssh-ws logs after deploy contained no error/warn/EACCES/DOMPurify/sanitize matches.
lastRun.deployment: Deployed: build and runtime bundle succeeded, services restarted, smoke passed, post-deploy browser/API verification succeeded, logs clean.
lastRun.nextTarget: Commit/push this Files/Media/Traffic closeout, then continue QA batch 3 with safe Files/storage/SFTP upload/download/direct-access user-path testing. Also consider a later Traffic UI polish to translate healthStatus UNKNOWN into operator-friendly localized status copy, distinct from the now-fixed traffic-source labels.
lastRun.nextAction: Commit and push the verified deployed closeout; then update lastRun.commit if a follow-up bookkeeping commit is needed.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified

productDirection: Active full-product functional availability loop: every cycle must balance feature completeness, real user journeys, code quality, performance, reliability, UI/UX/accessibility, permissions/security, tests, deployment health, and production verification. Static no-500 checks are insufficient without selected real workflow actions and side-effect verification.

lastRunEvaluation.scope: 2026-05-31 backlog remediation results and task/process quality
lastRunEvaluation.resultSummary: Strong verification discipline and meaningful improvements landed across runtime settings, polling preferences, bounded list performance, visual/light-theme QA, SMTP disabled-state clarity, and dashboard localization/client-boundary safety. Current production baseline is healthy and git is clean.
gaps: The active backlog cron had been removed, but repo state/backlog still referred to b8833e83bb1f as current; this was corrected.
The completion QA gate exists but remains mostly checklist-style; future runs should force real browser/user-path batches before ordinary backlog work after completion.

Recent work skewed toward settings/performance/polish; next cycle should deliberately rotate into core functional journeys such as VPS/server management, Files/SFTP/upload/download/direct access, Quick Services, Commands/Deployments, Backups/Restore, AI providers, API tokens, and image bed.
Static probes and 307/401/no-500 checks are not enough for feature completeness; future runs must exercise real UI actions and verify DB/filesystem/remote side effects where safe.
lastRunEvaluation.recommendedNextMode: Recreated as active full-product QA remediation cron 9e36e64a75ae; first runs should prioritize completion QA batches and real user workflow verification before ordinary backlog work.

commitPolicy.summary: Avoid frequent GitHub commit/push noise. Bundle related remediation changes, verification, deployment proof, backlog/state updates, and roadmap/future-goal updates into one intentional major-round closeout commit whenever safe.
exceptions: blocked/partial verified state where preserving work is safer

checks: major user-path coverage for the round
typecheck/lint/build/runtime build when product code changes

settingsCustomizationDirection.summary: Enrich Settings as the central customization/admin-control surface for safe runtime behavior, UI/personal preferences, notification/channel behavior, polling/list limits, SSH/SFTP/command stability knobs, AI/SMTP/image-bed/API-token/integration options, feature toggles, display/theme/language defaults, and other non-secret settings that currently require code/env edits.
acceptance: each setting has a real runtime side effect
tests at settings API/UI and at least one consumer

changes: major-round closeout must comprehensively check and update GitHub future goals
major-round closeout must update GitHub README.md project goals/roadmap when priorities or completed goals changed

cron.cadenceRationale: User requested less frequent autonomous repair runs; every 30m gives each major round more room for verification/deploy and reduces noise compared with every 20m.
cron.watchdogSchedule: removed; semantics fused into each remediation/daily-review closeout health check
cron.watchdogTriggerPolicy: The standalone lightweight watchdog cron was removed per user request. Do not recreate or schedule it unless explicitly asked. Each remediation/daily-review closeout performs one unified health check covering service active state, /api/status healthy, git worktree/origin status, critical cron states, and recent service logs; only fill missing probes.

policies.autonomousRepairCadence: Run full-product QA remediation every 30 minutes unless the user explicitly requests another interval.
policies.watchdogCadence: standalone watchdog cron removed; watchdog semantics fused into the single round closeout health check
policies.unifiedCloseoutHealthCheck: One closeout check per round: service active, /api/status healthy, git worktree/origin, critical cron states, recent service logs. Avoid duplicate probes if already completed during deploy verification.

events.summary: Changed active full-product QA remediation loop cadence from every 20m to every 30m per user feedback that prior cadence felt too frequent.

Watchdog dirty-worktree alert traced to prior full-product QA cron run that completed Global Search localization but hit tool limit before cleanup/state/commit. Manual closeout cleaned QA users, revalidated, committed and pushed functional closeout commit 7beb73c, and reran the watchdog silently.
Global Search localization closeout is committed and pushed as 7beb73c; origin/main matches local HEAD and the lightweight watchdog exits silently.
QA batch 2 SSH terminal modal accessibility/light-theme slice verified, deployed, and committed with backlog/state/roadmap updates.
Updated autonomous remediation and daily review policy so every major-round comprehensive check includes GitHub README.md project goals/roadmap alongside docs/plans roadmap files.

Paused lightweight watchdog interval cron b2f7b030a16f per user request as an intermediate step before fusing/removing it; remediation and daily review health checks later absorbed the watchdog semantics.
Per user clarification, fused watchdog semantics into the normal per-round health check so each round performs one unified closeout check instead of running a separate duplicate watchdog pass.
Removed standalone lightweight watchdog cron b2f7b030a16f per user request after fusing its health-check semantics into the normal per-round closeout check.
Direct Gateway recovery guidance/light-theme operator clarity slice verified and deployed; committed as 1d3b1da with roadmap/backlog/state updates.
Files batch operation accessibility dirty worktree closeout verified, deployed, committed, and ready to push.
QA batch 2 server-management status/readability slice verified, deployed, roadmap-updated, and committed.

QA batch 2 destructive VPS delete/edit-path safety slice verified, deployed, and committed as 76c8470: typed-name confirmation is enforced server-side before deleteServerProfile, the card delete confirmation is an accessible alertdialog with impact guidance, and edit/toggle/delete feedback is light-theme readable.
Files/Media/Traffic real-path availability closeout verified and deployed; pending commit/push.
Files/Media/Traffic real-path closeout verified, deployed, committed, and ready to push.
